free_text: Measurement of the analysing power in proton -proton

For the FD. -The FD(forward detector)
comprises a set of multiwire proportional and drift

The counters were used to measure the energy losses
required for particle identification.
for the STT.
The two STT(silicon tracking telescopes)consists of
three sensitive silicon layers of 70 mum, 300 mum and
5 mm thickness.
.The overall systematic uncertainty in
A(y) arising from asymmetry measurement with STT does
not exceed 0.3%.
.The dominant systematic error is that arising
from the determination of the beam polarization in the
EDDA polarimeter, which was estimated to be 3%.
.Only statistical errors were reported on fig.3
